message:
feat(suggestions): add suggestion data model and registry

Implement suggestions system for actionable guidance when commands blocked.
Includes SuggestionKind enum, Suggestion struct, SUGGESTION_REGISTRY,
lookup functions, and 11 unit tests. (git_safety_guard-1gt.5.1)
